title: Dead import in training pipeline
summary: Unused import of deprecated module left in training entry point
detail_html:
The import from src.obs.legacy import MetricsCollector at line 3 is unused. The MetricsCollector class was replaced by TensorBoardLogger in PR #4 but the import was never cleaned up.

This is a semantic dead code issue — ruff won't catch it because the import is used in a type annotation comment that's no longer evaluated.

title: Overly complex reward shaping function
summary: Reward shaping has cyclomatic complexity of 14 with deeply nested conditionals
detail_html:
The shape_reward() function in src/envs/rewards.py lines 45-112 has grown to cyclomatic complexity 14. The nested if/elif chains make it hard to verify correctness and easy to introduce off-by-one errors in paddle position checks.

Recommend extracting the three reward components (paddle proximity, ball trajectory, survival bonus) into separate pure functions.

locations.comment: Tests only cover the happy path, not edge cases

title: Clean DQN agent implementation
summary: Well-structured agent with clear separation of concerns
detail_html: The DQN agent in src/agents/dqn.py follows clean patterns: replay buffer is properly encapsulated, epsilon decay is configurable, and the target network sync uses a standard pattern. No issues found.
